evidence_gap.title: Prompt v2 formatting and latency need follow-up review
evidence_gap.detail: Live validation showed occasional code-fenced JSON output and a routine-case latency regression against the stored baseline. Compliance review remains open until those issues are re-evaluated.

review_notes: Ryva is used to collect evidence and maintain the AI System Record.
The demo does not claim Ryva guarantees HIPAA compliance.
